items.title: Hackers Can Go From CitrixBleed 2 Exploitation to Ransomware in Under an Hour
items.description:
A critical Citrix flaw is giving intruders a fast route from an internet-facing gateway to a ransomware event. The activity centers on CitrixBleed 2, tracked as CVE-2025-5777, which can expose memory from affected NetScaler ADC and Gateway appliances before a user signs in. That exposure lets attackers search for and reuse active session tokens. The […]

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Progress Urges ShareFile Admins to Shut Down Servers Over Credible Security Thre
id: 55daebed-ac5f-5612-ad52-b792164d603a
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Progress Urges ShareFile Admins to Shut Down Servers Over Credible Security Threat (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Progress Urges ShareFile Admins to Shut Down Servers Over Credible Security Threat
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/10
modified: 2026/07/10
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Progress Urges ShareFile Admins to Shut Down Servers Over Credible Security Threat — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-10T21:24:53Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "Progress Urges ShareFile Admins to Shut Down Servers Over Credible Security Threat", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Progress Urges ShareFile Admins to Shut Down Servers Over Credible Security Threat Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:4467702; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-10, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: Single source with minimal corroborating evidence

items.title: Linux Kernel FUSE Vulnerability Lets Attackers Gain Root Privileges
items.description:
A Linux kernel vulnerability in the FUSE subsystem can allow a local attacker to gain root privileges by overflowing the page cache with attacker-controlled directory entries. The flaw is tracked as CVE-2026-31694 and affects the code path used when the kernel caches FUSE readdir results. FUSE lets a userspace filesystem talk to the kernel through […]

items.title: Microsoft fixed Defender flaw RoguePlanet (CVE-2026-50656)
items.description: Microsoft fixed RoguePlanet (CVE-2026-50656), a Defender flaw allowing local attackers to gain higher privileges through the Malware Protection Engine. Microsoft released security updates for RoguePlanet, a vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-50656 (CVSS score of 7.8) affecting the Malware Protection Engine used by Defender. The Microsoft Malware Protection Engine (mpengine.dll) powers Defender’s malware scanning, detection, and removal […]
